title: Fusz Sword Blocking Compat - AA & CWSM
description: Sword Blocking Mechanics + Cracker's Witherstorm Mod & Additional Additions (and more mods) Modular Compat Datapack
body:
### Datapack 
Swords from Cracker's Witherstorm Mod & Additional Additions (and more mods) can now block while using Sword Blocking Mechanics.

### Main mod 
Fusz's Sword Blocking Mechanics only works for vanilla swords by default. Although making a datapack for it to work with modded swords is very easy.

*And so I did it, for anyone to download for this specific compatibility.*

## Install
- **Sword Blocking Mechanics** by Fusz is required 
- Which itself requires **PuzzlesLib**.
- Then, install any of the desired optional dependencies in the download pages.

NOTE:  The endgame swords from CWSM are an intentional exception!

NOTE2: It's recommended to use a datapack loader. Check out **Paxi** or **Global Packs** in the download pages.
